findings.requirement: US-8 / AC-2.2: Settings changes made before first message apply to first message
findings.detail: AC-2.2 is satisfied by the existing DataStore → bootstrap re-merge → first-inference read chain, which is correctly documented in the User-Spec Deviations entry (Clarification on AC-2.2). However, no task owns a unit regression guard for this data-flow path: the Testing Strategy section does not mention it, and ChatViewModelTest coverage does not include a draft-state settings persistence assertion. Task 10 (Pre-deploy QA) lists AC-2.2 as a Verify-user Honor 200 smoke item, which is the only formal coverage. For a size-S bugfix that relies on pre-existing code whose correctness is assumed rather than verified, this is acceptable but constitutes a minor partial coverage gap. Carry-over from R2; no new regression since then.

wave3_header_task_numbers.detail: Wave 3 header (line 282) now correctly reads 'Tasks 3, 4, 5 in parallel — disjoint file sets. Task 3 owns ChatViewModel.kt for this wave.' The stale '3, 6, 7' reference from the old numbering is gone.

implementation_tasks_preamble_ownership.detail: Implementation Tasks preamble (line 260) now correctly states: ChatViewModel.kt touched by Tasks 3 (Wave 3) and 6 (Wave 4); ChatScreen.kt touched only by Task 6; ErrorLog.kt (Task 1, Wave 1) must land before Task 2. The previously wrong attribution of ChatScreen to Task 5 and the omission of Task 6's ChatViewModel ownership are both corrected.

task6_self_reference.detail: Task 6 description (line 310) now reads 'becomes implicit after Task 4' — correctly naming the task that adds enableEdgeToEdge(), not Task 6 itself.

wave_structure.detail: Wave structure is correct: Wave 1 (ErrorLog), Wave 2 (ResetReason + ModelRegistry), Wave 3 (Bug 1 + edge-to-edge + docs), Wave 4 (Bug 2 wiring), Audit Wave (Tasks 7–9), Final Wave (Task 10). Four implementation waves plus Audit and Final as specified.

US-8_AC-2.2.note: Existing DataStore chain; no unit regression guard

summary: 11/12 requirements covered, 1 partial (AC-2.2 — existing-plumbing path documented in User-Spec Deviations but no unit regression guard). 0 missing. All four round-2 findings are resolved: the Wave 3 header correctly names Tasks 3, 4, 5; the Implementation Tasks preamble correctly attributes ChatViewModel.kt to Tasks 3 and 6, ChatScreen.kt to Task 6 only; Task 6 self-reference corrected to 'after Task 4'; wave structure is 4 implementation waves + Audit + Final. One carry-over minor partial (AC-2.2) remains — not a critical gap for a size-S bugfix. Zero critical findings. Status: pass.
